context: Verify that the agent focuses on literature-review-specific dimensions, identifies gaps and synthesis quality, and frames feedback constructively.

checklist.name: Literature review dimensions prioritised
checklist.description: The agent focuses on Literature Review, Problem Formulation, and Writing Quality dimensions, weighting them appropriately for a thesis chapter.

checklist.name: Coverage comprehensiveness assessed
checklist.description: The agent comments on whether the review covers foundational and recent work, including seminal papers.

checklist.name: Critical synthesis evaluated
checklist.description: The agent distinguishes between mere summarisation and critical synthesis, noting whether themes and contradictions are identified.

checklist.name: Research gaps explicitly addressed
checklist.description: The agent identifies whether the review clearly maps out open research questions.

checklist.name: Feedback framed constructively
checklist.description: Weaknesses are presented as improvement opportunities with specific, actionable suggestions.
